title: Branik Mod
description: Adding Czech beer Branik to Minecraft
body:
![branik logo 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1104a42c002b17e12da962466ca3927149cfe0be.png)
### Branik Mod started as a joke "Let's add beer to minecraft!". It's sole purpouse is about brewing and drinking beer, which adds a lot of different effects.

## Items

### Branik ![Branik2L 11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/733c096c66fe2c7fd8995cb8baeb992d8b110cce.png)
Drinking Branik adds beneficial effects for combat
- Branik in small bottles:
  Branik 11°, Branik 12°, Branik 14°, Branik 14°
- Branik in large bottles:
  Branik2L 11°, Branik2L 12°, Branik2L 14°, Branik2L 18°

### Ostravar ![Ostravar 12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/953263e7f339fb610b0db7e23ad81583cad3886d.png)
- small bottles, adds beneficial effects for mining
  Ostravar 11°, Ostravar 12°

### Blazenak ![Blazenak 14](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73e3d6dc42456f23559e1940ace0e2806883358c.png) 
- small bottles, adds beneficial effects for nether exloration
  Blazenak 11°, Blazenak 12°, Blazenak 14°, Blazenak 18°
  
## Blocks

### Branik Cases ![Branik 12 case side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6718244fef144bbfc87a111216ad23ef154a2a.png)
- for all Branik small bottle types, used as decoration and compression of Branik bottles (similar to vanilla Hay Bale, 3x3 crafting recipes)

### Branik 2l Packs ![Branik 12 pack side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3277817ab06ccf5d013d68561493eb24187ce9c7.png)
- for all big Branik bottle types, similar to Branik Cases and real-world 6-Packs of beer

## Crop

- Hops, needed to give Beer it's unique flavour

## Machines

- A lot of real beer brewing inspired:
  Malting Machine, Fermentation Keg, Branik Tap, Branik Barrels
- Also not brewing inspired
  Branik Engine I, II, III for generating small amounts of energy,
  depending on beer strongness

## Fluids

- Branik 11°, Branik 12°, Branik 14°, Branik 18°, comes with buckets

## Toxicity

- Drinking too much in small amount of time comes with consequences. Negative effects based on Estimated Blood Alcohol Content (EBAC in per mille (‰)). Shows on your screen
- Mild drunkness adds beneficial Euphoria effect (small speed and haste boost) ![euphoria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a9ab3f02ebec0f5d14e886f6059653692845f9.png)

## How-to add?

Check the versions, Forge versions require **Kotlin for Forge** by thedarkcolour [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)
Currently I have only 2 version of Branik Mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1, best use with [Kotlin For Forge 4.11.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge/version/4.11.0)
